label: 6801 Definitions

children.heading: AIDS
children.label: 1 AIDS
children.text: The term “AIDS” means the acquired immune deficiency syndrome.

children.heading: Association
children.label: 2 Association
children.text: The term “Association” means the International Development Association.

children.heading: Bank
children.label: 3 Bank
children.text: The term “Bank” or “World Bank” means the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development.

children.heading: HIV
children.label: 4 HIV
children.text: The term “HIV” means the human immunodeficiency virus, the pathogen which causes AIDS.

children.heading: HIV/AIDS
children.label: 5 HIV/AIDS
children.text: The term “HIV/AIDS” means, with respect to an individual, an individual who is infected with HIV or living with AIDS.
